_doc: Apnosh content schema -- declares which copy on this site is editable from portal.apnosh.com. Length limits prevent layout breaks. Voice rules are advisory.

fields.label: Hero eyebrow
fields.description: The small line above the big headline (currently 'Seattle's First'). Short, punchy.

fields.label: Hero subhead
fields.description: The line under the big headline. Sets the tone of the home page.
fields.default: Fresh groceries, a quick bite at the café, and daily essentials — all within walking distance.

fields.label: Featured deal item
fields.description: Item name shown next to the $10 price stamp on the hero image.

fields.label: Logo
fields.description: Shown in the header and footer. Use a transparent PNG for best results.

fields.label: Hero photo
fields.description: Big photo on the right of the home page (currently the bagel tower).

fields.label: About Us photo
fields.description: The photo next to the origin story on the About page.

fields.label: Featured deal stamp on hero
fields.description: Show or hide the $10 price stamp on the hero photo.

fields.label: Statistics block (Built for Everyday)
fields.description: Show or hide the '3 Locations / 12+ Meal Options / 20+ Boba Flavors' counters.

fields.label: Footer tagline
fields.description: The descriptive sentence under your logo in the footer.
fields.default: Fresh food. Fast service. No compromise. Your neighborhood market in the heart of Seattle.
